action.reasoning: Observation: Val MAE improved from 0.0606 to 0.0582 (raw model) over 100 more epochs. EMA is hurting (0.0604 vs 0.0582). Previous test MAE was 0.0607. Analysis: Current checkpoint should give better test score. EMA decay too slow, should disable or lower. Model plateaued. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint, then try improvements like larger hidden dim or removing EMA.
